name: help
summary:
List commands and drill into usage. 
    
Examples: 

/help session [<subcommand>]
/session help [<subcommand>]

are all valid.

subcommands.name: topic
subcommands.summary: Command name and optional subcommand.

arguments.name: path
arguments.summary: e.g. session, session new, ai provider

name: session
summary: Agent sessions: new, attach, resume, list, and inspect messages.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for session or one of its subcommands.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.summary: Optional subcommand name such as new, attach, list, resume, or messages.

subcommands.name: new
subcommands.summary: Create a new agent session.

subcommands.name: attach
subcommands.summary: Attach an external session id and set it as current (opencode only for now).

subcommands.name: resume-last
subcommands.summary: Resume the latest session for the current backend.

subcommands.name: resume
subcommands.summary: Resume a session by id (any backend).

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List all sessions (all backends).

subcommands.name: messages
subcommands.summary: Show last N messages for a session (default N=5).

name: story
summary: List and start guided plugin walkthroughs.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List available stories.

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.summary: Start a story by id.

name: bot
summary: Bot status, identity, workspace, lint, logging, ready DM, Web Push test, and watch restart.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for bot or one of its subcommands.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.summary: Optional subcommand: status, workspace, lint, log, ready, restart, …

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.summary: Bot status and current session/mode/backend.

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.summary: Show git hash for this AppWeaver core checkout.

subcommands.name: ping
subcommands.summary: Health check (replies pong).

subcommands.name: identity
subcommands.summary: Print the bot npub. A trailing literal npub is accepted for compatibility.

subcommands.name: workspace
subcommands.summary: Show or set workspace target [parent|bot].

subcommands.name: lint
subcommands.summary: Run lint or configure auto-lint after agent.

subcommands.name: log
subcommands.summary: Show or set info-level console logs.

subcommands.name: ready
subcommands.summary: Show or set startup "Agent is ready" DM.

subcommands.name: push
subcommands.summary: Send a test Web Push to all browsers that clicked Push (requires VAPID in .env).

subcommands.name: restart
subcommands.summary: Request a process restart when running under watch (creates restart.requested).

name: ai
summary: Agent mode, backend, models, and payment provider (Routstr).

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for ai or one of its subcommands.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.summary: Optional: mode, backend, model, models, provider.

subcommands.name: mode
subcommands.summary: Set default agent mode.

subcommands.name: backend
subcommands.summary: Show or set agent backend [cursor|opencode].

arguments.name: name
arguments.summary: Backend name or omit to show current

subcommands.name: model
subcommands.summary: Show or set the model override for the current backend.

arguments.name: name_or_reset
arguments.summary: Model id, reset, or omit to show

subcommands.name: models
subcommands.summary: List models available for the current backend.

subcommands.name: agents
subcommands.summary: Manage OpenCode agents in the web UI.

subcommands.name: agents-new
subcommands.summary: Create a new OpenCode agent.
subcommands.usage: agents-new <name> [--description, undefined <description>] [--model, undefined <model>] [--color, undefined <color>] [--steps, undefined <steps>] [--mode, undefined <mode>] [--prompt, undefined <system_prompt>] [--hidden, undefined] [--disabled, undefined] [--perm-read, undefined <perm_read>] [--perm-edit, undefined <perm_edit>] [--perm-glob, undefined <perm_glob>] [--perm-grep, undefined <perm_grep>] [--perm-list, undefined <perm_list>] [--perm-bash, undefined <perm_bash>] [--perm-task, undefined <perm_task>] [--perm-external_directory, undefined <perm_external_directory>] [--perm-todowrite, undefined <perm_todowrite>] [--perm-question, undefined <perm_question>] [--perm-webfetch, undefined <perm_webfetch>] [--perm-websearch, undefined <perm_websearch>] [--perm-codesearch, undefined <perm_codesearch>] [--perm-lsp, undefined <perm_lsp>] [--perm-doom_loop, undefined <perm_doom_loop>] [--perm-skill, undefined <perm_skill>]

subcommands.name: agents-edit
subcommands.summary: Edit an existing OpenCode agent.
subcommands.usage: agents-edit <name> [--description, undefined <description>] [--model, undefined <model>] [--color, undefined <color>] [--steps, undefined <steps>] [--mode, undefined <mode>] [--prompt, undefined <system_prompt>] [--hidden, undefined] [--disabled, undefined] [--perm-read, undefined <perm_read>] [--perm-edit, undefined <perm_edit>] [--perm-glob, undefined <perm_glob>] [--perm-grep, undefined <perm_grep>] [--perm-list, undefined <perm_list>] [--perm-bash, undefined <perm_bash>] [--perm-task, undefined <perm_task>] [--perm-external_directory, undefined <perm_external_directory>] [--perm-todowrite, undefined <perm_todowrite>] [--perm-question, undefined <perm_question>] [--perm-webfetch, undefined <perm_webfetch>] [--perm-websearch, undefined <perm_websearch>] [--perm-codesearch, undefined <perm_codesearch>] [--perm-lsp, undefined <perm_lsp>] [--perm-doom_loop, undefined <perm_doom_loop>] [--perm-skill, undefined <perm_skill>]

subcommands.name: agents-delete
subcommands.summary: Delete an OpenCode agent.

subcommands.name: agents-upsert-json
subcommands.summary: Internal structured save for the AI agent editor.

subcommands.name: agents-save
subcommands.summary: Save the full OpenCode agents draft config.

subcommands.name: agent-set
subcommands.summary: Select the current OpenCode agent.

subcommands.name: agent-restore
subcommands.summary: Restore OpenCode agents in opencode.json to the built-in defaults.

subcommands.name: root-model
subcommands.summary: Show or set the OpenCode root model.

arguments.name: model_or_reset
arguments.summary: Model id, reset, or omit to show current value

subcommands.name: provider
subcommands.summary: Payment provider and Routstr (set, deposit, balance, …).

arguments.name: subcommand
arguments.summary: set, deposit, refund, balance, budget, status, models, sync-models, add-model

name: wallet
summary: Cashu wallet: mint, balance, receive, send, history.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for wallet or one of its subcommands.

subcommands.name: mint
subcommands.summary: Show or set default Cashu mint URL.

subcommands.name: mints
subcommands.summary: List mints in wallet.

subcommands.name: balance
subcommands.summary: Show Cashu balance for default mint.

subcommands.name: decode
subcommands.summary: Decode a Cashu token (no spend).

subcommands.name: receive
subcommands.summary: Receive a Cashu token.

subcommands.name: send
subcommands.summary: Create and send a Cashu token (sats).

subcommands.name: history
subcommands.summary: Recent spend history.

name: bunker
summary: Bunker remote signers: list and add connections.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for bunker or one of its subcommands.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List saved bunker signer connections.

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.summary: Connect and save a bunker signer.

name: wot
summary: Web of Trust: crawl, score, and stats.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for wot or one of its subcommands.

subcommands.name: crawl
subcommands.summary: Crawl a root-relative WoT graph.

subcommands.name: score
subcommands.summary: Inspect WoT score for a pubkey.

subcommands.name: stats
subcommands.summary: Show stored WoT graph stats for a root.

name: bm
summary: Bookmarks: structured links with categories, tags, media types, drafts, and publish.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for bm or one of its subcommands.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.summary: Optional subcommand name (e.g. list, search, ai).

subcommands.name: ai
subcommands.summary: Create bookmark drafts from natural language (accept / revise / decline).
examples: /bm ai rust async book for weekend reading

subcommands.name: summarize
subcommands.summary: Fetch a bookmark URL and save a summary (agent).

subcommands.name: next
subcommands.summary: Oldest unconsumed match (prefers queue); optional media type and filters.

subcommands.name: done
subcommands.summary: Mark a bookmark consumed and remove it from the queue.

subcommands.name: queue
subcommands.summary: Add a bookmark to the active backlog.

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.summary: Explains that bookmarks are added via ai drafts (no direct add here).

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List local bookmarks; optional filters and category tree view.

options.name: no-queued
options.summary: Only bookmarks not in the queue.

subcommands.name: search
subcommands.summary: Search published bookmarks, paginate results, or import a hit (see help search).

arguments.name: args
arguments.summary: Subcommand and parameters (e.g. title, import <id>, next, prev, page <n>).

subcommands.name: tags
subcommands.summary: List tags with bookmark counts.

subcommands.name: cats
subcommands.summary: List categories with bookmark counts.

subcommands.name: types
subcommands.summary: List media types with bookmark counts.

subcommands.name: context
subcommands.summary: Show tags, categories, and media types for ai context.

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.summary: Show one bookmark by id.

subcommands.name: publish
subcommands.summary: Publish one bookmark via bunker signer.

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.summary: Draft a single-field update (url, title, summary, description, category, tags, media_type, in_queue).

arguments.name: value
arguments.summary: New value (use --clear on the CLI for nullable fields).

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.summary: Delete a bookmark.

subcommands.name: drafts
subcommands.summary: List drafts or show one draft by id.

subcommands.name: accept
subcommands.summary: Accept a draft (or all pending drafts).

arguments.name: target
arguments.summary: Draft id or the word all.

subcommands.name: revise
subcommands.summary: Revise a draft with natural-language corrections (agent).

subcommands.name: decline
subcommands.summary: Discard a draft.

name: browser
summary: AI-driven browser automation with multi-tab task execution.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for browser or one of its subcommands.

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.summary: Run a browser task or respond to a waiting task.

arguments.name: prompt
arguments.summary: Natural language instruction — what to do, or a response to a waiting task.

examples: /browser run publish my draft post to LinkedIn and X

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List all browser tasks and their current status.

subcommands.name: clear
subcommands.summary: Delete all tasks and events from the database.

name: file
summary: Browse the workspace tree, diff and preview files, upload files encrypted for another bot (NIP-17), and download by naddr.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for file or one of its subcommands.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.summary: Optional subcommand name: upload, download, tree, search, view, diff, bottomup, bottomup_context, summarize, or topdown.

subcommands.name: upload
subcommands.summary: Encrypt and upload a workspace file for another bot (Blossom + NIP-17).

arguments.name: filePath
arguments.summary: Path relative to the active workspace root.

subcommands.name: download
subcommands.summary: Download and decrypt a shared file by naddr into the workspace.

arguments.name: naddr
arguments.summary: Note address (naddr1…) of the file share.

subcommands.name: tree
subcommands.summary: Print a text tree of the workspace (depth, folder, extension filter). Web UI loads folders lazily.

arguments.name: rest
arguments.summary: Optional max depth, target directory (relative), and other tree tokens.

options.name: expanded
options.summary: Web UI internal state for lazily expanded folders.

subcommands.name: search
subcommands.summary: Search file contents under the workspace with optional extension and folder filters.

arguments.name: keyword
arguments.summary: Text or regex pattern to search for.

options.name: path
options.summary: Directory to search, relative to workspace root.

subcommands.name: view
subcommands.summary: Preview a file under the workspace (path relative to workspace root).

arguments.name: path
arguments.summary: File path relative to workspace root.

options.name: previousDir
options.summary: Tree directory to return to in the web UI.

options.name: line
options.summary: Line number to highlight in the web file viewer.

subcommands.name: diff
subcommands.summary: Show a simple git diff preview for one workspace path.

arguments.name: path
arguments.summary: File or folder path relative to workspace root.

options.name: previousDir
options.summary: Tree directory to return to in the web UI.

options.name: timeline
options.summary: Render web output with the timeline diff card.

subcommands.name: bottomup
subcommands.summary: Generate local `__BOTTOMUP.md` files depth-first for a folder subtree.

arguments.name: workingDir
arguments.summary: Folder relative to workspace root. Omit for the workspace root.

options.name: scopeRoot
options.summary: Logical documentation root relative to workspace root.

options.name: depth
options.summary: Maximum recursive depth. Omit for unlimited.

options.name: model
options.summary: Override the model used to generate summaries.

subcommands.name: bottomup_context
subcommands.summary: Read existing bottom-up documentation for a folder, its parents, and child status.

arguments.name: workingDir
arguments.summary: Folder relative to workspace root. Omit for the workspace root.

options.name: scopeRoot
options.summary: Logical documentation root relative to workspace root.

options.name: parents
options.summary: How many parent folders to include.

options.name: children
options.summary: How many child levels to inspect for `__BOTTOMUP.md` presence.

subcommands.name: summarize
subcommands.summary: Return a flat AI summary for a folder or subtree without writing files.

arguments.name: workingDir
arguments.summary: Folder relative to workspace root. Omit for the workspace root.

options.name: scopeRoot
options.summary: Logical documentation root relative to workspace root.

options.name: depth
options.summary: Maximum recursive depth. Omit for unlimited.

options.name: model
options.summary: Override the model used to generate summaries.

subcommands.name: topdown
subcommands.summary: Enrich existing __BOTTOMUP.md files using __BOTTOMUP_SUMMARY.md context.

arguments.name: workingDir
arguments.summary: Folder relative to workspace root. Omit for the workspace root.

options.name: scopeRoot
options.summary: Logical documentation root relative to workspace root.

options.name: depth
options.summary: Maximum recursive depth. Omit for unlimited.

options.name: model
options.summary: Override the model used to enrich summaries.

options.name: force
options.summary: Run even when summary/doc enrichment metadata is stale or present.

name: job
summary: Scheduled agent jobs: one-time or cron, drafts via AI, list/show/history/run.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for job or one of its subcommands.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.summary: Optional subcommand: ai, drafts, list, show, confirm, run, …

subcommands.name: ai
subcommands.summary: Create a job draft from natural language (requires an agent backend).

arguments.name: prompt
arguments.summary: Natural-language description of the schedule and task.

examples: /job ai daily summary every weekday at 9am
/job ai remind me in 15 minutes to check the logs

subcommands.name: drafts
subcommands.summary: List pending job drafts (confirm, revise, or discard).

subcommands.name: confirm
subcommands.summary: Create a job from a pending create draft.

arguments.name: draftId
arguments.summary: Numeric draft id from drafts list.

subcommands.name: revise
subcommands.summary: Ask the agent to revise a create draft (requires an agent backend).

arguments.name: corrections
arguments.summary: What to change in the draft.

subcommands.name: discard
subcommands.summary: Delete a pending draft.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List all jobs (markdown table).

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.summary: Show details for one job.

subcommands.name: enable
subcommands.summary: Enable a job.

subcommands.name: disable
subcommands.summary: Disable a job.

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.summary: Delete a job permanently.

subcommands.name: history
subcommands.summary: Show recent runs for a job (default last 10).

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.summary: Run a job once immediately.

name: todo
summary: Todo management with nested tasks, AI drafts, and ranking.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.summary: Show command help for todo or one of its subcommands.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.summary: Optional subcommand name such as list or start.

subcommands.name: ai
subcommands.summary: Use AI to list todos or prepare draft todo changes.
examples: /todo ai add a todo to take medicine tonight at 9PM

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.summary: Add a todo, optionally under a parent todo.

subcommands.name: drafts
subcommands.summary: List pending drafts or show a single draft.

subcommands.name: accept
subcommands.summary: Accept one draft or all drafts.

arguments.name: target
arguments.summary: Draft ID or the word all.

subcommands.name: revise
subcommands.summary: Revise a create draft with AI-generated corrections.

arguments.name: corrections
arguments.summary: Correction text for the revised draft.

subcommands.name: decline
subcommands.summary: Discard a pending draft.

subcommands.name: duel
subcommands.summary: Rank sibling todos by pairwise comparison.

options.name: reset
options.summary: Reset comparisons before starting the duel.

subcommands.name: focus
subcommands.summary: Set the current focus todo.

subcommands.name: unfocus
subcommands.summary: Clear the current focus todo.

subcommands.name: current
subcommands.summary: Show the current leaf todo in the selected scope.

subcommands.name: next
subcommands.summary: Show the next pending leaf after the current one in scope.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List todos in the current scope or a selected subtree.

options.name: level
options.summary: Limit output to a tree depth.

subcommands.name: move
subcommands.summary: Move a todo under a new parent or back to the top level.

options.name: under
options.summary: Optional parent todo ID. Omit for top level.

subcommands.name: done
subcommands.summary: Mark a todo and its descendants as done.

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.summary: Delete a todo and all of its descendants.

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.summary: Show detail for a single todo.

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.summary: Set a todo to in progress.

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.summary: Update a todo field such as title, status, or description.

arguments.name: field
arguments.summary: Field name: todo, title, status, or description.

arguments.name: value
arguments.summary: New value for the selected field.
